resources.user_reaction_message: I was transferring files for an approved project backup.
resources.close_note: Confirmed policy violation. User warned and HR notified. USB device confiscated.
resources.ai_summary: User john.doe copied confidential HR salary records to an unauthorized USB device and attempted to upload to a personal Google Drive account. The action was blocked by endpoint DLP after detection. High-severity incident requiring immediate escalation.

source.outline: Spreadsheet containing employee salary and compensation data for 250 employees. Blocked by DLP policy during unauthorized transfer attempt.

destination.outline: Blocked write attempt to unauthorized USB device. Transfer prevented by DLP policy enforcement.

source.outline: File blocked during upload attempt to personal cloud storage. DLP policy enforcement successful.

destination.outline: Upload to personal Google Drive blocked by DLP policy. No data transferred to external destination. Incident closed as confirmed policy violation.
